name: Berry Streusel Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. For the streusel: Mix brown sugar, flour, and lemon peel in a bowl. Stir in pecans and melted butter. Set aside.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a 12-cup muffin tin or line with 2-1/2 inch paper baking cups.
3. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugars, baking powder, lemon peel, cinnamon, and salt.
4. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients. Add milk, melted butter, and egg to the well and mix until smooth.
5. Fold in the fresh blackberries and raspberries.
6. Spoon batter into prepared muffin cups, filling them 2/3 full.
7. Top each muffin with 1 heaping tablespoon streusel.
8. Bake muffins until a tester comes out clean, about 20 to 25 minutes. Cool for 5 minutes in the tin on a rack before removing muffins. Serve warm or at room temperature.
